summary: Iteration 2 (Google OAuth + Drive backup) end-to-end testing complete. 37/37 backend pytest pass (12 new tests added for Google OAuth URL/exchange/connect, /api/auth/me extra fields, /api/backup/status|run|test, /api/settings/backup gating). Frontend Login Google button correctly POSTs /api/auth/google/url and redirects to accounts.google.com with the configured client_id (239524592693…), redirect_uri, scope and state. Settings page shows the new BACKUP · GOOGLE DRIVE section (status, stats, Connect button, Activate Backup toggle). Toggling backup ON without Drive connected produces the expected error toast 'Connetti Google Drive prima di attivare il backup'. Admin logs (/admin/logs) still gated by password Rome02009. No regressions on Iteration 1 flows.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1076 lines — splitting into routers (auth, google_oauth, backup, pdfs, libraries, admin, settings) is overdue.
google_integration.py uses lazy env loading (good for load_dotenv timing). Token exchange happens synchronously in async endpoints via httpx; verify it awaits properly (it does via gi.exchange_code).
/api/backup/run uploads PDFs sequentially in a request handler (asyncio.to_thread per file) — for large libraries (>50 PDFs) this can time out. Recommend background task with progress endpoint.
/api/settings/backup correctly rejects enabling without google_refresh_token (server.py:524) — good.
/api/pdfs/{id}/file Drive restore path: data is downloaded then written back to local FS — good fallback. No size cap; consider streaming for huge files.
user_public exposes auth_provider, has_google_drive, is_admin — clean.

Google OAuth state is generated server-side (good) but never validated on /api/auth/google callback — the frontend GoogleCallback should match the returned state with the one stored. Only mild risk for MVP since redirect_uri is whitelisted in Google Console.
test_credentials: admin@scorelib.app / Admin02009!  ; admin logs password: Rome02009  ; Google client_id 239524592693-qhl4tacfd7t1ids24bq9tq5dj31a8mlk
seed_data_creation: No new seed data; reused the 2 admin PDFs from Iteration 1 (visible in stats: File totali 2, Su Drive 0, In attesa 2).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://8cedaa1a-c927-45ec-866c-e6599d6754ea.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. The full Google OAuth round-trip cannot be verified end-to-end via Playwright because the preview hostname (8cedaa1a-…preview.emergentagent.com) is NOT in the Google Console authorized redirect URIs (only score-vault-4.preview.emergentagent.com and localhost:3000 are). End-to-end OAuth would fail at Google with redirect_uri_mismatch. We verified up to the point of redirect to accounts.google.com which contains the correct client_id, redirect_uri (window.origin), state and scope. To fully validate, add the current preview hostname to Google Console.
rca of the issue: No issues found in iteration 2. Iteration 1's duplicate-detection bug appears fixed (test_upload_duplicate now passes — second upload of identical bytes returns duplicate:true). All Google OAuth + Drive backup gating works as specified.
